entry.title: How to mass create handling units of with mixed materials
entry.content:
First, create a packing instruction using the app “Create Packing Instruction – Master Data”.
For that, you need a business role that is, for example, based on the predelivered business role template: Master Data Specialist – Handling Unit Data (SAP_BR_HU_MASTER_SPECIALIST).

  1. Open the app “Create Packing Instruction – Master Data”, enter a name and press “Continue”.

     

  2. Under the tab “Components” provide the packaging material for item category “Packaging Materials (P)”.

     

  3. Next, enter the materials with the target quantities that you want to pack with this packing instruction, using item category “Material (M)”.
  4. Press “Save”.

Second, create a determination record using the app “Create Determination Record – Packing Instruction”.
For that, you need a business role that is, for example, based on the predelivered business role template: Master Data Specialist – Handling Unit Data (SAP_BR_HU_MASTER_SPECIALIST).

  1. Open the app “Create Determination Records – Master Data”, enter a Determination Type and press enter.

     

  2. Select a Key Combination and press “Choose”.

     

  3. Enter the materials with the packing instruction and press “Save”.

Third, use the ‘automatic packing’ function for the determination type selected earlier for the determination record.

  1. In this example, materials are entered for an outbound delivery.
    In the app “Create Outbound Delivery – without Order Reference” (VL01NO), click on “Pack”.

     

  2. Press “Automatic Packing”.

     

  3. In the tab “Pack Material” you can see the handling units created.

     

  4. In the tab “Total Content” you can confirm that they have the desired structure.

entry.title: 嵌入式 SAC 客戶用例分享之加值中心集成（台灣地區本地化需求）
entry.content:
本文介紹的台灣特有的業務場景：透過加值中心集成申報 VAT。這是客戶系統實施嵌入式分析的一次概念驗證的成果，以驗證可以在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 中獲取到台灣 VAT 申報所需要集成的相關電子發票資訊，並支持將其資料可視化。本文以台灣某加值中心的集成需求為例，向讀者介紹如何借助嵌入式分析獲取到相關業務資料，支持客戶進行集成。

客戶的需求

台灣地區客戶可透過自選的加值中心進行VAT申報。在系統導入專案的實施過程中，其面臨的主要挑戰是抽取並整合來自不同交易憑證的資料源。由於各個加值中心在格式和欄位標準上存在差異，目前 SAP 並未提供與各加值中心廠商的開箱即用集成解決方案。因此，客戶需要充分利用現有的 CDS 視圖，透過客製化開發，獲取所需的資料，並滿足特定格式要求，實現資料的高效集成。

鑒於上述挑戰，客戶可考慮採用嵌入式分析功能來滿足該業務需求。

本文將基於以下 VAT 申報集成欄位需求示例展開：

元素順序

元素名稱

最大長度

必要性

1

主檔代號

3

M

2

發票號碼

10

M

3

發票日期

8

M

4

發票時間

6

M

5

發票傳送日期

8

O

6

發票傳送時間

6

O

7

發票接收日期

8

O

8

發票接收時間

8

O

9

發票金額（未稅）

12

M

10

稅率別

1

M

11

營業稅額

12

M

12

發票人統一編號

8

M

13

受票人統一編號

8

M

14

發票人名稱

60

M

15

發票人名稱二

20

O

16

發票人地址

75

M

17

發票負責人

10

O

18

發票人電話

15

M

19

受票人名稱

60

M

20

受票人地址

75

O

21

稅捐稽徵處名稱

40

O

22

核准日

8

O

23

核准文

40

O

24

核准號

20

O

25

款項別

1

M

26

相關號碼

20

O

27

彙開標記

1

O

 

解決方案

主要步驟：

  • 分析業務需求，確立 S/4HANA Cloud 中對應的資料來源 CDS 及欄位名
  • 針對尚未 Release 的標準 CDS，創建客製化義業務對象（Custom Business Object）
  • 創建客製化 CDS 視圖
  • 創建客製化分析查詢
  • 創建多维報表

具體步驟將在下面詳細描述。為了保護客戶敏感資料，一些截圖來自虛擬測試系統。

  1. 分析業務需求，確立 S/4HANA Cloud 中對應的資料來源 CDS 及欄位

當前 S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 暂未提供整合的電子發票 CDS 視圖，故專案實施需要透過各個模組的憑證資料來源 CDS 來獲取相關資料，並加工整合。

  • 以前文提到的業務需求為例，識別出以下核心標準 CDS 視圖作為資料來源：
  • CDS：I_BillingDocument、I_BillingDocumentItem 覆蓋資料：基於請款憑證的發票抬頭及行明細資訊
  • CDS：I_Address_2 覆蓋資料：發票人與受票人的名稱、電話、地址等資訊
  • CDS：I_Businesspartnertaxnumber 覆蓋資料：受票人的統一編號資訊
  • CDS：I_KR_BusinessPlace 覆蓋資料：發票人的營業場所詳細資訊
  • 需要特殊處理的數值
  • 稅率別

依照請款憑證行項目的稅率分為：1 應稅、2 零稅率、3 免稅。從系統中的稅碼到稅分類的轉換，需要在 CDS 數值加工中處理，詳見步驟3。

  • 營業場所與銷售辦公室的關係

發票人的營業場所資訊（例如發票人統一編號、印章電話等）需要透過請款憑證行項目的 Sales Office 欄位讀取其對應的 Business Place 資訊。但當前系統中暂無 Sales Office 與 Business Place 關聯關係的 CDS，故此關係需要借助客製化業務對象（Custom Business Object）來維護實現，詳見步驟2。

除本文提供的實施建議外，若您期望 SAP 能透過標準產品內容提供統整的台灣電子發票 CDS 視圖，歡迎您透過贵司的 S-User 訪問 https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/340825，投出您寶貴的一票。

   2. 針對尚未 Release 的標準 CDS，創建客製化義業務對象（Custom Business Object） 

由於目前沒有現成的 CDS 視圖展示 Business Place 和 Sales Office 的關聯關係，可以創建一個客製化業務對象 YY1_BUSINESSPLACE2SALESOFF。該對象將保存 Business Place 和 Sales Office 之間的對應關係，暴露相關資料。

 

本文假定業務場景為，台灣地區設台北、高雄各一個營業場所。在客製化義業務對象中維護其對應關係如下。 注意該資料資訊應與配置點 103391 Assign Business Places to Sales Offices 保持一致。

 

    3. 創建客製化 CDS 視圖

 

接著需要創建 2 個 CDS 來揭露相關資料來源。找到應用客製化義 CDS 視圖並創建新的 CDS 視圖。

 

首先創建的是標準 CDS 視圖 YY1_BillingItemTW。該 CDS 視圖主要揭露了電子發票的詳細資訊，例如發票代碼、金額、發票人和受票人等資訊。選擇 I_BillingDocumentItem 作為主資料來源，並添加 I_BillingDocument、I_Businesspartnertaxnumber 以及客製化業務對象 YY1_BUSINESSPLACE2SALESOFF。

 

添加參數起始日期和截止日期。

 

 

添加主資料來源和關聯資料來源裡的元素，例如發票代碼、稅額、金額等。

 

添加必要的計算，例如稅率別。由於 I_TW_TaxCode 未開放用於開發，所以需要透過創建計算，按固定邏輯獲取配置級別的稅碼分類。本例中的計算邏輯如下：

A1/A2/A6/A9: 1

A3/A5/A7/AW: 2

A8/AZ: 3

 

維護元素屬性並設置過濾。

 

儲存並發布該視圖。

然後基於建立成功的CDS視圖YY1_BillingItemTW，建立第二個CDS視圖YY1_BillingCubeTW，並新增關聯資料來源I_KR_BusinessPlace和I_Address_2，主要用於揭露受票人和發票人的詳細資訊。該CDS視圖為cube類型。

 

新增必要的元素以及計算。例如受票人和發票人地址。透過建立計算，組合地址資訊，以滿足不同價值中心的格式需求。

 

維護元素屬性，然後儲存並發布 CDS 視圖。 到目前為止，所有視圖已建立完成。

   4. 建立自訂分析查詢

在主頁中找到「自訂分析查詢和服務」應用並建立新的客製化查詢。（⚠️“自訂分析查詢和服務”是新的建立分析查詢的應用程式，後續支援發布為Ina Service，用於後續MDA報表、審核手冊和eSAC故事。）

 

選擇YY1_BillingCubeTW作為資料來源並新增欄位。

 

 

然後儲存並發布查詢。

接下來需要將建立好的查詢發布為InA服務。進入管理InA服務。

 

添加查詢 YY1_BILLINGTW，然後發布。

  5. 建立多維報表

進入管理KPI與報表應用，選擇多維報表，點擊建立，添加建立好的查詢為資料來源。儲存並發布。

 

依照業務需求，為該報表維護業務目錄。多維報表建立完成。客戶可以依照自己的業務需求，調整頁面佈局及格式，增加顯示一些關鍵度量的圖表可視化。

 

結論

透過使用嵌入式分析，客戶可以高效地利用其強大的分析功能來解決業務上的分析問題。當然客戶也可以直接將CDS封裝為API進行消費。具体操作可參考鏈結。

在未來，我們將繼續與讀者分享更多有關嵌入式分析的成功案例。

有關SAP S/4HANA Cloud嵌入式SAC的更多資訊，可以查看以下鏈結：

  • S/4HANA Cloud嵌入式分析——数据展现的灵活扩展：click here
  • 嵌入式分析云客户用例：如何在S/4HANA Cloud中创建定制SAC story和dashboard: click here
  • 嵌入式SAC客户用例分享之生产成本分析：click here
  • 嵌入式SAC客户用例分享之货物移动分析：click here
  • 嵌入式SAC客户用例分享之库龄分析：click here
  • 嵌入式SAC客户用例分享之物料库存分析：click here
  • 嵌入式SAC客户用例分享之销售毛利分析：click here
  • 嵌入式SAC客户用例分享之外向交货和开票概览：click here
  • 嵌入式SAC客户用例分享之交货完成分析：click here
  • 嵌入式SAC客户用例分享之进销存报表：click here
  • 嵌入式SAC客户用例分享之集团报表：click here
  • 嵌入式SAC客户用例分享之期间费用表（跨三年比较）：click here
  • 嵌入式SAC客户用例分享之财务关键指标比较：click here
  • 嵌入式SAC客户用例分享之采购对账仪表盘：click here
  • 嵌入式分析客户用例分享之AVC： click here

entry.title: S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, public sector Trial System
entry.content:
Curious about SAP's Cloud ERP solution for governmental, non-profit, education and research organizations?  As promised, the new trial environment for S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, public sector is now available.  Here's a direct link to the trial system, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, public sector Trial.  You can find the link on the government industries page on SAP.com:

Choose Explore Government Solutions, then select the Trial link under Cloud ERP.

Alternatively, you can also find the link at Try SAP, under Basic Trials, Industries.

The basic trial of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, public sector is a limited-time, 14-day experience that allows you to learn about the solution features and capabilities at no cost and through a shared tenant using sample data. You can explore the system through guided tours or discover functionalities on your own.  

  • Discover the capabilities of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for the public sector through guided tours

  • Experience key business processes such as budgeting or grants management and experiment with sample data

  • Start your basic trial without the need for any setup or configuration

You'll find guided tours for Accounts Payable, Grants Management, and Budget Management.

Access the three guided tours from your home page:

  • Grants Management: As a Grants Specialist you would like to monitor grants and review associated details and dimensions. Embedded analytics empowers you to quickly analyze all grants relevant KPIs and alerts. For example, you can see how much budget your grants have and view any open grant relevant commitments.
  • Budget Management: As a Budget Specialist you would like to review details associated with various funds you are managing. You also regularly monitor important information such as budget consumption and open commitments using embedded analytics that empower you to take essential actions and stay on track.
  • Accounts Payable: As an Accountant, you would like to review important KPIs and drill down to the data for analysis and reconciliation. You also regularly identify open invoices to perform further Actions. Embedded analytics help you to easily view details such as overdue payables and cash discount utilization.

Once you've completed the guided tours, click around and check out some of the other available content.   This is just the tip of the iceberg when it comes to the SAP Business Suite functionality available for public sector.  Find links on the Industries or Trial pages to reach out for further information. 

Happy exploring!

entry.title: New Review Order Progress - Multilevel View App
entry.content:
Exciting news coming to you in the area of manufacturing with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.1 Release. The new app Review Order Progress - Multilevel View (F7681) is finally here. 

 

Review Order Progress - Multilevel View App (F7681)

 

What is the Purpose of this App? 

With this app, you can review the progress of a selected sales order, production order, or process order. The app displays a multilevel view of all relevant component requirements and their receipt elements, as well as additional information, for example, about shortages or other issues that might occur for each component.

This app is contained in the business catalog Production Planning - MRP Cockpit (SAP_SCM_BC_MRPCOCKPIT_MC).  

 

Summary of key Features

This app provides the following key features:

  • Display the component requirements and receipt elements, as well as all associated requirements and receipts for the selected order on multiple levels of the order structure. Supported order types include sales order, process order, or production orders.

  • Check the progress of production or procurement for a particular order. Check whether there are shortages or other issues with meeting requirements for any component at any level.

  • Show the delay of a specific component, referred to as the component delay. It also shows the total delay of an order. The total delay is calculated based on a proposed requirement date for each component. This date takes into account the requirement date of the selected order as well as different scheduling parameters, for example, the planned delivery time or in-house production time of superordinate components.

  • Navigate to other apps for further processing or monitoring from the material, requirement element or receipt element, for example, Manage Material Coverage, Display Material Stock, Display Sales Order, Display Planned Order, Change Planned Order, or Display Purchase Requisition.

  • Export the component structure with all relevant information into a Microsoft Excel file.

How do I use this app? 

Your Entry Point - Header Level

You start at header level to specify all filter parameters. Indicated with a red star are all mandatory filter fields:  

Entry Level Header Level - Filter Possibilities

Document Selection  

You can specify, enter or select the order type & number of the sales order, production order, or process order that you want to display:

Header Level - Document Type & Number

 

  • For Sales orders, simply type the order number directly into the input field or use the value help.

  • For Process or Production Orders, open the value help dialog and select the Process and Production Order search template.

    • You can then search for your document and select it from the results list

Search

First you can enter an exact search term or use the generic search by just entering part of the term.

Header Level - Search

The results list includes all possible matches for the following columns:

  • Material
  • Plant
  • MRP Controller

Issues Only

You can use the filter Issues Only to display the order structure only for those components for which issues have been identified:

Header Level - Issues Only Yes / No

 

 

 

  • Select Yes to restrict the displayed order structure to those components that have identified production or procurement issues, including their superordinate components.

  • Select No to display the complete order structure including all components, regardless of whether they have issues.

Order Component Level 

Once you have filtered the order structure the action happens on the order component level. Let's look at the information you can gain. 

Material 

The column displays the material number and description of the components that are included in the Bill - of - Material (BOM) in the selected order. If a component is included multiple times within the Bill - of - Material (BOM), for example, if it is required for several sub-components, this column includes multiple entries for the same material.

Order Component Level - Material

 

The material components are displayed in a multilevel view to indicate the structure of the Bill - of - Material (BOM) in the selected order. Requirement and receipt information including coverage issues are displayed for each component.

When you use a special planning procedure for materials, as defined in the material master data, the materials may not display in the order tree. For instance, consider the MRP Type ND. This MRP type stands for "No Planning". In such cases, the materials aren't displayed in the order tree.

From the Material Number column, you can also open a quick view for each component to access additional information such as material details, MRP data, stock and shortage information.

Order Component View - Related Actions for Material

 

Issues 

This column displays the number of issues and warnings that were detected for each requirement included in the selected order, as well as their criticality. It also indicates whether issues exist on the subordinate structure levels of each component.

 

Order Component Level - Issues

The system detects the following issues and indicates their criticality, using different colors and icons:

Warnings (non critical issues) are shown in yellow:

  • Opening Date in the Past - The opening date of a receipt element occurs in the past.
  • Start Date in the Past - The basic start date of a receipt element occurs in the past.

 

Order Component Level - Issue Warning

Errors (critical issues) are shown in red:

 

Order Component Level - Errors

 The errors can be the following:

  • Finish Date in the Past (The basic end date or the delivery date of a receipt element occurs in the past):

Error - Finish Date in the Past 

  • Reschedule In
    • A receipt should be rescheduled to an earlier date to avoid a material shortage.
    • Check if it is possible to bring forward (reschedule in) the availability date for the receipt in the Manage Material Coverage app.
  • Coverage not Provided by Master Plan
    • There is insufficient coverage because a planned receipt does not cover the required quantity at all or it covers the required quantity only partially.

You can click the icon to access a list of all detected issues for a selected component and to sort them by criticality (error / warning). To access a list of all issues that exist for an order, click the icon that is displayed for the top-level node of the structure. The number displayed within this icon indicates the sum of all errors and warnings that were detected for the order.

Requirement Element 

This column displays the requirement elements that exist for each material component.

Order Component Level - Requirement Element

If more than one requirement exists for a material within an order, a separate row is displayed for each requirement element.

The comparison of requirement and receipt elements helps to analyze the demand and supply situation for each material component. The following types of requirement elements can be included in the table:

  • CusOrd (Sales Order)
  • DepReq (Dependent Requirement)
  • OrdDS (Release of Stock Transfer Order)
  • OrdRes (Dependent Reservation)
  • PRqRel (Release of Stock Transfer Requisition)

You can click on a requirement element to open a quick view with more detailed information or to navigate to other apps for information about related objects or further processing. For example, you can access the Display Sales Order, Display Planned Order or Change Planned Order apps using the Related Actions link in the quickview.

Order Component Level - Requirement Element Related Actions

 

Proposed Requirement Date

Shows the date at which the required quantity of each component needs to be on hand to make sure the selected order can be fulfilled on time.

Order Component Level - Proposed Requirement Date

To determine this date, the system considers the requirement date of the selected sales order, process order, or production order as well as different scheduling parameters that are defined in the material master data. 

The proposed requirement date helps you determine whether a specific component is actually required earlier or later than the date specified in its requirement document. To calculate it, the system uses the requirement date of the selected order and additionally considers different scheduling parameters, depending on the procurement type of each component material:

  • For components with a superordinate component that is procured externally, the system subtracts the goods receipt processing time in working days and the planned delivery time in calendar days from the proposed requirement date of the superordinate component. The resulting date is the proposed requirement date for the selected component.
  • For components with a superordinate component that is produced in-house, the system subtracts the goods receipt processing time and the in-house production time in working days from the proposed requirement date of the superordinate component. The resulting date is the proposed requirement date for the selected component.

Requirement Date

The requirement date comes from the documents itself, e.g. from the requirement date of a sales order: 

Requirement Date

 

Receipt Element

This column displays the receipt elements that exist for each requirement of a material component.

Order Component Level - Receipt Element

The comparison of requirement and receipt elements helps to analyze the demand and supply situation for each material component. The following types of receipt elements can be included in the table:

  • PldOrd (Planned Order)
  • POitem (Purchase Order Item/ Stock Transport Order Item)
  • PrcOrd (Process Order)
  • PrdOrd (Production Order)
  • PurRqs (Purchase Requisition)
  • SchLne (Schedule Lines)
  • Stock (Stock)

If more than one receipt element is related to a requirement, the system displays the most critical MRP element (the most delayed element) and a link that you can click on to display an overview of all receipt elements assigned to the requirement.

Order Component Level - Receipt Element Link

 

Note that this overview is automatically sorted by Availability Date first, then by Covered Quantity and Receipt Element. You cannot change this sorting.

Clicking on a specific MRP element opens a quickview with additional details on the element, as well as options to navigate to other apps for information about related objects or for further processing. For example, you can access the Display Sales Order, Display Planned Order , or Change Planned Order apps using the Related Actions link in the quickview.

Order Component Level - Receipt Element Related Actions

 

Availability Date

This column displays the date at which the quantity of a receipt element is available.

Order Component Level - Availability Date

If more than one receipt element is available for a requirement, the availability date of the most critical receipt element (the one with the greatest delay) is displayed in this column.

If the availability date falls after a component's requirement date, the system automatically calculates and shows the delay in the Component Delay column.

Order Component Level - Availability Date to Component Delay

Uncovered Quantity

The uncovered quantity is the part of the order quantity that can neither be covered on time (covered quantity) nor with a delay (late quantity).

Order Component Level - Uncovered Quantity

 

The uncovered quantity is determined by subtracting the late quantity from the missing quantity.

Missing Quantity

Specifies the part of the component quantity that is missing in order to cover a specific requirement.

Order Component Level - Missing Quantity

The missing quantity includes both late and uncovered quantities and is determined by subtracting the covered quantity from the required quantity.

Component Delay 

Displays the number of working days that the availability of a receipt quantity is delayed for an individual component.

Order Component Level - Component Delay

For each receipt element of a component, the system compares the Requirement Date with the Availability Date to calculate the number of days it is delayed. If the Availability Date falls after the Requirement Date, the difference is shown as delay for the component and it is highlighted in red.

If there is more than one receipt element with a delay for the same requirement, the most critical delay (the highest value) is displayed in this column. To display the component delay for each receipt element individually, you can click the more link in the Receipt Element column.

Total Delay

Displays the maximum delay that is determined for the receipt elements of all subordinate components at a specific level of the order structure.

Order Component Level - Total Delay

The value that is displayed in this column helps you determine how much the components of an order structure are actually delayed, based on the individual delays of their underlying components. Since the requirement of a selected order cannot be fulfilled before all subordinate material components are available, the total delay on the top level of the order structure always matches the maximum delay that was determined for the lower levels of the structure. The same applies to component requirements at lower levels of the order structure, if these have subordinate component requirements assigned.

To determine the total delay at a specific component level, the system compares the Proposed Requirement Date with the Availability Date and calculates the number of working days that each receipt element is delayed. If more than one receipt element exists for a requirement, it determines the maximum delay of all receipts. As a second step, the system checks if the total delay of any receipt element at a lower level of the order structure is greater and displays the maximum delay value in this column.

Late Quantity

The late quantity is the part of the order quantity that can be covered at a later point in time, for example, because it first needs to be provided by a supplier and is received only after the requirement date.

Order Component Level - Late Quantity

 The late quantity is determined by subtracting the uncovered quantity from the missing quantity.

Covered Quantity

Specifies the part of the order quantity that has not yet been issued to the customer, but can be covered in time, for example, based on the available stock or planned receipts.

Order Component Level - Covered Quantity

 

Watch the Replays of Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Early Release Series!   

Between January 21 and January 24, we conducted a series of 21 engaging live sessions to showcase the thrilling innovations included in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 release. If you missed the live sessions, don't worry! You can still access the whole series or select the sessions that interest you the most. Seize this opportunity to watch them on demand at your convenience–anywhere, anytime.  

Find All of Our Assets   

SAP S/4HANA Cloud is the foundation of the intelligent, sustainable enterprise and is an innovative, robust, and scalable ERP. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team has created for you below:

entry.title: Scheduling dates through developer extensibility
entry.content:
Intro

Available-to-Promise (ATP) is a business function in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. It provides a response to order fulfillment requests in Sales & Delivery and Production Planning. Scheduling functionality is a crucial part of ATP, offering this functioanlity as an API empower users to meet specific customer requirements concerning order entry and delivery-date calculations for Sales Order requirements.

 

API for ATP Scheduling

To schedule dates through developer extensibility we introduced in the release 2502 of S/4HANA Public Cloud the API for ATP Scheduling: CL_ATP_SCHEDULING_API. This API class is used to determine scheduling dates like Material availability date/time (MBDAT), Transportation planning date/time (TDDAT), Loading date/time (LDDAT), Goods issue date/time (WADAT), Delivery date/time (LFDAT) and Goods Receipt End Date (ELDAT). This API determines these dates based on provided inputs from customer implemented Business Add-In (BAdI), with the goal of calculating and adjusting the Requested Delivery Date (RDD) in the Sales Order.

If you, as a customer, want to use this API, you can do so for example by implementing the BAdI SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM_REQDATE as part of key user extensibility. This can be done in the App Custom Logic using the role SAP_BR_ADMINISTRATOR.

When the method EXECUTE_SCHEDULING of API CL_ATP_SCHEDULING_API is called with the necessary inputs within customer specific implementation of a BADI method IF_EX_SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM_REQDATE~MODIFY_ITEM_REQ_DAT, it returns scheduled dates and a message table which displays messages pertaining to failure or success of the API.

Example

Company XYZ receives sales orders from 2 regions and needs to adjust the RDD dynamically, on the basis of the warehouse processing time and the shipping duration. Region A is at a farther location than Region B. So, in that case, due to longer shipping duration, the sales orders from Region A should have an extra two days added for processing. Adding the 2 days to the RDD can be implemented in the BAdI.

The interesting part is to ensure validity of this newly calculated date. For this you can call the API (eg.: to schedule with Business Process Scheduling (BPS) within ATP) for validation of the new dates.

Here is an example implementation of the BAdI how you can call the API for validating and/or recalculating the RDD:

 

"Input date_time can be any timestamp in UTC format. The date and time should be converted if required.
    "Example how to get current date_time.
    GET TIME STAMP FIELD DATA(lv_date_time).

*    "Example implementation of how to convert RDD into the date_time using Ship-to Party time zone.
*    DATA(lv_shiptoparty) = salesdocumentpartners[ partnerfunction = 'WE' ]-customer.
*    SELECT SINGLE i_organizationaddress~addresstimezone FROM i_customer WITH PRIVILEGED ACCESS INNER JOIN i_organizationaddress WITH PRIVILEGED ACCESS
*      ON i_customer~addressid = i_organizationaddress~addressid
*      AND i_organizationaddress~addressrepresentationcode IS INITIAL
*      WHERE i_customer~customer = _shiptoparty
*      INTO (lv_shiptoparty_timezone).
*    CONVERT DATE salesdocument-requesteddeliverydate TIME '000000' INTO TIME STAMP DATA(lv_date_time) TIME ZONE lv_shiptoparty_timezone.

    cl_atp_scheduling_api=>get_instance( )->execute_scheduling(
      EXPORTING
        is_scheduling_param  = VALUE #( sales_document = salesdocument-salesdocument
                                        sales_document_item = salesdocumentitem-salesdocumentitem
                                        date_time = lv_date_time
                                        date_type = '50' )
      IMPORTING
        et_message               = DATA(lt_message)
        et_scheduling_result     = DATA(lt_scheduling_result)
    ).

    IF lt_scheduling_result IS NOT INITIAL.
      "Update RDD if necessary.
      requesteddeliverydate = lt_scheduling_result[ 1 ]-delivery_date.
    ENDIF.

 

Result

  • Initial Requirement: Requested Delivery Date eg. February 10, 2025 (Monday) – the date at the point of sales order creation.
  • Updated Requirement: The customer specific implementation of BAdI will call the API as shown above and retrieves the updated and scheduled delivery dates shifting it 2 days into the future to February 12, 2025 based on BPS settings.

 

Outro

The Scheduling API, is an important component used to manage scheduling dates in alignment with standard scheduling systems. The integration of this API within the customer specific implementation SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM_REQDATE BAdI makes sure that there is accuracy in the scheduling and adjustment of the RDD. This helps in maintaining consistency and ensuring that you are adhering to scheduling policies.

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite – Connect Everything FEATURING WORKDAY
entry.content:
Introduction

This blog is the second part of our “Connect Everything” campaign. If you haven’t heard about it yet, check out the main blog post series for an overview of our campaign.

What does this blog cover?

In this post, we will demonstrate how easily a Workday solution can be integrated with SAP S/4HANA  Cloud. This seamless connection is made possible by the SAP Integration Suite, which ensures smooth and efficient integration between the two systems.

Integration Scenario

Many organizations use Workday as their primary HR system for managing employee data, while SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is used for enterprise operations. To ensure accurate HR and system access management, companies need a reliable integration that automatically replicates employee records from Workday to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, keeping workforce data consistent across systems.

With this integration, employees from Workday are created as Workforce Persons in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. At the same time, this process enables automatic user provisioning, meaning that once an employee is replicated, the corresponding business user is also created in SAP, granting them access to relevant applications and processes.

As shown in the process figure below, a scheduled job in SAP Cloud Integration queries Workday for any updated or newly created employee records. Workday processes the request and returns the relevant employee data. If no changes are found, the process ends. Otherwise, the data is transformed into the required SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition format. The transformed records are then sent to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, where employees are either created or updated as Workforce Persons, ensuring their details are up to date.

 

How to set up the scenario?

Overview:

  1. Find the right scenario
  2. Prepare SAP S/4HANA Cloud
  3. Prepare Workday
  4. Configure Cloud Integration

 

1.Find the right scenario at API Business Hub

SAP offers a wide range of pre-built integration content for Workday and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. To explore what’s available, visit the SAP Business Accelerator Hub, where you can filter by the systems you need and find ready-to-use integration packages that streamline the setup process.

  • Open SAP Business Accelerator Hub
  • Search for the package SAP S/4HANA Cloud Integration with Workday
  • Select Replicate Employee from Workday to SAP S4HANA Cloud

 

  • Here, you can discover and analyze the integration flow
  • Under Documents, you will find the link to the documentation, which you can read through


2.Prepare SAP S/4HANA Cloud

  • Create the Communication System and Communication User
    • Create new User for Inbound Communication
    • Save your credentials for cloud integration configuration

Communication System

Communication User

 

  • Create Communication Arrangement
  • Choose Scenario -> SAP_COM_0301
  • Maintain your created communication system and Inbound User 
  • Save the SOAP API Endpoint Replicate Basic Master Data for Workforce from External HR Systems for cloud integration configuration

Communication Arrangement

3.Prepare Workday

Check instruction in the documentation of the Integration Flow -> Configuration Guide

4.Configure Cloud Integration

  • As a prerequisite, first install the Workday Adapter from the discover menu for prepackaged integration content  in your environment
  • Once successfully copied to your design runtime, deploy the Workday Adapter.
  • After you install the Workday Adapter, copy the package ->SAP S/4HANA Cloud Integration with Workday to your own design runtime

Workday Package

  • Select the value mapping artifact
  • Maintain your value mapping for the GenderCode and CompanyCode, as required in your SAP S/4HANA Cloud
  • Select the Replicate Employee from Workday to SAP S4HANA Cloud  Integration Flow and click on configure

Artifacts

  • Here maintain your Workday tenant configuration values like tenant url, credentials 
  • Maintain the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition parameters, which were set up in the previous step.
    • Configure the inbound endpoint of SAP S/4HANA Cloud 
    • Maintain also SAP S/4HANA Cloud credentials for authentication.

Conclusion 

Setting up the Workday to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Integration was easier than expected, thanks to prebuilt content available in the SAP Integration Suite. Instead of starting from scratch, we could leverage ready-to-use integration flows that only required minimal configuration. However, for businesses with more complex needs, there’s always the option to customize or build entirely new integrations

Have you worked on a Workday-SAP integration before? What were your key takeaways? Let’s start a discussion—share your insights or drop your questions in the comments. And stay tuned for more content in our "Connect Everything" series!

entry.title: Your opportunity to Influence SAP – SAP Customer Engagement Initiative 2025-1 for SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA Cloud is a complete, modular Cloud ERP software designed for every business need – powered by AI and analytics. With SAP S/4HANA Cloud, you can run your mission-critical operations in real time from anywhere, introduce new business models in your industry, and expand globally with a trusted partner.  

An exciting opportunity to influence SAP has begun with the first cycle in 2025. The SAP Customer Engagement Initiative enables you as an SAP customer or partner, to get early insights into SAP’s product developments and directly work with the developers to define and shape future product directions. 

The projects will be open for customer registration until  March 28, 2025. 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud projects for registration:

  • Identifying and resolving critical situations in a production planners day in S/4HANA Public Cloud
  • Identity and Access Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
  • Insights into Business processes with Business Event Logging
  • Joule and GenAI use cases in SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
  • New Financial Reporting for Enterprise Project (Project Booklet) including ETO
  • Planned New Solution for Cost Component Breakdown
  • Project staffing, consider dependencies across different roles in a project

Seize this opportunity to make your voices heard – register on influence.sap.com and be a part of the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Cycle 1 in 2025! If you are also interested in other SAP Customer Engagement Initiative projects that are currently open for registration, check out the full list here. 

Warm regards, 

Your SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Team 

Follow-up after registration: When you register for a project, you will be invited to an introductory call with the SAP project lead. At this point further participation is optional. Typically, all activities are governed by the Feedback Agreement with SAP.

entry.title: Unable to Read Repository at / Error Connecting to URL Error In Eclipse IDE-SAP BTP / S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Everyone , 

For the past few months / weeks I have been getting either of these two errors  

1. Error connecting to https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/ . 

2. unable to read repository  https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/latest or URL https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/<eclipse-version> . 

while installing the ADT Tools in the eclipse . 

I have extensively seen this error in the 2024-12 version of the IDE. 

there are many solutions being discussed around but I have found a rather simple solution , which I would like to share .

Steps : 

1. Go to https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/ for getting the ADT tools repository for your eclipse version .

2. select the repository  Link which you will be using to install the eclipse , in my case it will be https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/2024-12 .

3. Open the link in a new tab.

4. Save the Certificate for this site ; I'm using the Google Chrome browser , I will mention the steps for Microsoft Edge Below in this Blog .

  1. Click on the view site information icon (Left to the YRL) 

  2. Click on the Connection is Secure menu   

  3. Click on Certificate is Valid option 

  4. Go to the Details tab and click on Export button 

  5. Save the certificate with a name 

5. Apply the saved Certificate .

  1. Go to the saved Location and double click the certificate . 

  2. Click on Install Certificate  and choose Current User Click Next 

  3. Choose Automatically select the certificate store based on type of certificate option and choose next 

  4. Click Finish 

  5. You will get a popup saying import is done successfully  , Click Ok 

6. Now restart the eclipse and follow the steps to install ADT tools .

 

Steps to Save Certificate in Microsoft Edge Browser:

Once you are in the ADT tools link Page (Now you are in step 4)

  1. Click on the lock icon left to the URL 

  2. Click on the connection is secure menu 

  3. Click on the certificate button next to close button 

  4. Go to the Details tab and Click on Export button 

  5. Save your certificate 

  6. Now resume from step 5 

NB : This Blog is written solely from my experience , knowledge and my vision . If any misleading and wrong information is conveyed please correct me in the comments.

#Knowledge_sharing_is_caring

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud公共版2502中有哪些AI功能可以参与Beta测试？
entry.content:
上两篇博客中我们介绍了SAP近期在S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition2502中推出的多项AI功能，以及通过限时促销免费获取SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502中的AI辅助功能的活动。 本篇将为您汇总介绍在2502中参与 Beta测试的功能，覆盖财务洞察、智能决策、搜索优化、个性化体验及错误处理等核心场景。

这些功能通过生成式AI（Generative AI）技术，将复杂流程简化，赋予用户更高效的协作与决策能力。以下我将为您解析这些创新功能，并附上参与Beta测试的快速通道。

 

Financial Business Insight Group reporting: 财务业务洞察之集团财务报表AI解析

化繁为简，让财务数据“开口说话”

核心价值： 

- 战略决策支持：通过AI解读复杂财务KPI，结合用户注释生成多维度分析，让数据背后的业务意义一目了然。 

-报告效率革命：自动生成关键数据的上下文摘要，减少人工整理时间，聚焦核心洞察。 

-协作透明化：在财务评审中整合数据与团队反馈，提升跨部门沟通效率。 

技术亮点： 

- 基于生成式AI的数据摘要与情境化KPI计算。 

- 支持用户评论与数据融合的“富文本”报告生成。 

- 提供按业务需求筛选和导航的智能工具。 

点击Beta注册链接

 

AI-assisted easy enterprise search： AI辅助智能企业搜索

用自然语言解锁全域数据搜索

核心价值

- 搜索效率飞跃：直接输入自然语言（如“显示上月未结订单”），快速定位业务对象。 

- 可信赖的AI结果：基于企业级数据的精准反馈，避免通用AI的“幻觉”风险。 

- 零学习成本：新手友好设计，一键激活即可使用。 

技术亮点： 

- 支持在SAP Fiori启动台直接进行自然语言搜索。 

- 用户端可自由启用或关闭该功能。 

- 搜索栏实时提示AI功能状态，避免混淆。 

 

点击Beta注册链接

 

AI-Assisted Smart Personalization of My Home AI智能个性化主页

打造专属数据看板

核心价值： 

- 卡片化洞察：用自然语言添加定制化数据卡片（如“显示亚太区季度销售额趋势”），实时预览效果。 

- 业务透明度提升：通过9款预置Fiori应用，快速构建关键指标仪表盘。 

技术亮点： 

- 从主页一键触发AI卡片生成流程。 

- Beta阶段支持主流业务应用的卡片创建。 

- 预览机制确保数据准确性与可视化效果。 

 

点击Beta注册链接

 

AI-Assisted Error Explanation AI辅助错误解析

从报错到解决，一步到位

核心价值： 

- 故障处理加速：自动解析技术错误并提供修复建议，减少IT依赖。 

- 无缝集成体验：在原有报错界面直接生成解释，避免跳转中断。 

技术亮点：

- 结构化呈现问题根源与操作指南。 

- 支持用户反馈情感（如点赞/改进建议），持续优化AI模型。 

 

点击Beta注册链接

Generative AI Recommendations for Situation Handling： 基于生成式AI的情况处理推荐

精准建议，让决策快人一步

核心价值：

- 职责定制化：根据用户角色与任务场景，推送针对性解决方案。 

- 响应效率提升：缩短问题处理时间，降低操作复杂度。 

技术亮点： 

- 新增“我的情况-扩展版”应用，集成AI实时推荐。 

- 通过大语言模型（LLM）整合外部数据，增强建议的全面性。

SAP为Beta参与者提供了独家技术支持和反馈通道。无论您是财务专家、IT管理员还是业务决策者，均可通过以下链接报名，抢占智能化升级的先机。立即加入Beta计划，与全球先锋用户共同定义下一代ERP的智能标准！

未来已来，AI不再仅是工具，而是成为融入业务脉动的智慧伙伴。通过SAP S/4HANA Cloud的AI赋能，企业将解锁数据潜力，让每一份洞察转化为行动力，每一步决策扎根于精准。

entry.title: AI Solutions in Global ERP Systems: Accelleron's SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Implementation
entry.content:
Accelleron's digital transformation journey with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition was the focus of an episode 116 of the Inside SAP S/4HANA Cloud podcast. Hosted by Markus Oertelt, the episode featured insights from Annika Baechle, SAP Application Owner with a focus on sales and services at Accelleron, and Alexander Finger, CTO at SAP Switzerland.

Together, they discussed their experiences in implementing SAP solutions and leveraging artificial intelligence for operational efficiency. This blog post distils their conversation, emphasizing Accelleron's strategic moves and SAP's role in facilitating their journey.

Accelleron's aim to enhance efficiency and sustainability in turbocharger development was a central theme of the discussion. Annika shared a use case highlighting the importance of logistical efficiency in their operations, emphasizing the significant role of turbochargers in reducing emissions while ensuring robust engine performance. The discussion outlined Accelleron's readiness to provide rapid logistical support, ensuring seamless operations for customers worldwide.

Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Faced with the complex task of migrating from ABB’s SAP ERP central component, Accelleron decided to standardize its processes through SAP's offerings. The transition to a dual-tier SAP setup, incorporating both an on-premise ERP system and a global SAP S/4HANA Cloud system, transformed Accelleron's operational approach. This strategic change enabled seamless service integration across 40 countries, aligning processes with SAP's best practices to minimize deviations and ensure compliance with regional regulations.

A significant milestone in this journey was achieving a global rollout of SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud in two-and-a-half years. This project involved integrating processes across numerous locations, a task that demanded careful alignment with SAP’s established best practices. The result was enhanced operational coherence and adherence to legal requirements, reinforcing Accelleron's commitment to leveraging technology for operational excellence.

AI Solutions and SAP Switzerland's AI Hackathon

In association with SAP Switzerland's AI Hackathon, Accelleron developed a novel AI-driven tool, the "Test Plan Ninja." This SAP Fiori app was designed to automate the creation of test plans and processes, facilitating efficient regression testing across the company’s extensive network. Despite technical challenges, Accelleron used OpenAI, custom CDS views, and SAP Signavio Process Intelligence to streamline test processes. Annika emphasized how this tool simplifies testing, ensuring comprehensive coverage across regions and exemplifying Accelleron's dedication to innovation in quality assurance.

Alexander Finger provided insights into the SAP Switzerland AI Hackathon, highlighting its role in encouraging innovation across different industries. Participants engage in the event to craft use cases that are evaluated based on their originality, integration with existing systems, and business impact. The Hackathon emerged as a dynamic platform fostering creativity and collaboration, with the Test Plan Ninja serving as a successful example of what can emerge from such environments.

Learn more about the SAP’s Switzerland Hackathon

The collaboration between Accelleron and SAP underscores the capacity of technology to drive meaningful advancements in industry processes. Their journey highlights the importance of adopting flexible, scalable solutions like SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, which facilitate efficiency and support sustainable practices.

 

Take the chance to listen to the episode 116: AI Solutions in Global ERP Systems – Accelleron's SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Implementation Journey. Click here, tune in and subscribe.

Podcast Inside SAP S/4HANA Cloud

There is no customer success without project success and product success! Leverage the unique knowledge and expertise of SAP S/4HANA Cloud experts, partners, and customers, sharing their SAP S/4HANA Cloud product insights, implementation project best practices and lessons learned – anywhere, anytime. In this podcast, we give you all ingredients to get to the next level and make your SAP S/4HANA Cloud project a success. Check all the episodes at sap.com/podcasts, Spotify, Apple Podcasts, TuneIn, and more audio platforms.

Do you want to contact us or send your suggestion for the next episodes? Send us an e-mail to insides4@sap.com

entry.title: End-to-End Guide: Deploying a Fiori App – From BTP Destination Creation to Public Cloud Deployment
entry.content:
Overview

Deploying an application in the public cloud requires a structured approach involving multiple configurations and integrations. This guide provides a detailed, step-by-step process to ensure a smooth deployment. The key steps include setting up destination connections, creating communication systems, building the app in Business Application Studio (BAS), deploying it, and configuring it in ABAP. This document also highlights important screenshot points to help visualize each step.

Step 1: Set Up the Destination Connection

  1. Open BTP Cockpit and Login: Access the BTP cockpit and log in to your account.
  2. Navigate to Sub-Account: Select and go to the relevant sub-account.
  3. Go to Destinations: Navigate to the "Destinations" section and create a new destination.
  4. Configure Destination Settings:
    • URL: Copy the hostname URL from the Communication Systems app and paste it into the destination URL field. Make sure that to use the URL of the development client to build and deploy an application. If the URL of customizing client is used, then it will lead to issues while deploying application.
    • Authentication Type: Use SAMLAssertion.
    • Audience: Retrieve the OAuth 2.0 SAML2 Audience from the technical data section in the Communication Systems app.

       

    • AuthnContextClassRef: Set it to urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:2.0:ac:classes:PreviousSession.
    • HTML5.DynamicDestination: true
    • HTML5.Timeout: 60000
    • nameIdFormat: urn:oasis:names:tc:SAML:1.1:nameid-format:emailAddress
    • sap-client: Specify your client (e.g., 100).
    • WebIDEEnabled: true
    • WebIDESystem: Specify your system (e.g., KOE).
    • WebIDEUsage: dev_abap, odata_abap, bsp_execute_abap, ui5_execute_abap.

       

  5. Download Trust File: Click on "Download Trust" to save the trust configuration locally.

Step 2: Create a Communication System in SAP S/4HANA Cloud

  1. Access the Communication Systems App: Open the app in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

     

  2. Create a New Communication System:
    • Specify the system ID as BAS_<Subdomain Name> and provide a meaningful system name.

       

  3. Set Technical Data:
    • Go to the "Technical Data" section and select the checkbox for "Inbound Only".

       

    • Go to the identity provider and turn the SAML Bearer Assertion provider.

       

  4. Configure Identity Provider:
    • Enable the "SAML Bearer Assertion" provider.
    • Upload the trust file downloaded in the previous step.
    • After uploading the document fill the above SAML Bearer Issuer field by coping the address from the Signing certificate Subject from the “cfapps….” to till the last.

Step 3: Create the Application in BAS

  1. Open BAS: Access the SAP Business Application Studio.
  2. Create Application Using Template:
    • Select the "SAP Fiori Generator" template.
  3. Configure Application:
    • Select the template as "List Report Page" or required template.

       

    • Choose the data source, system, and OData service.

       

    • Select the main entity of the service.

       

  4. Add Project Attributes:
    • Provide details like project name, namespace, and deployment configurations.

       

       
  5. Add Deployment Configuration:
    • Add the required details for deployment.

       

  6. Configure Fiori Launchpad:
    • Add the required details for the launchpad configuration.

       

  7. Finalize and Create Project: Click "Next" and create the project.

Step 4: Deploy the App from BAS

  1. Open Integrated Terminal:
    • Right-click on the project folder and open the terminal.
  2. Run Deployment Command:
    • Execute "npm run deploy" in the terminal.

       

    • Verify details and confirm deployment by typing y. 
  3. Verify Deployment: Ensure the deployment completes successfully.

     

  4. After deploying the application, if you see the preview of the application, you will get a 404 error. That is because the deployed app should be configured and published in IAM apps in Eclipse.

Step 5: Configure the App in ABAP (Eclipse)

  1. Open Eclipse: Launch Eclipse and open the package used for deployment.
  2. Create IAM App:
    • Right-click on the package and create an IAM app.

       

    • Provide name, description, and set Application Type to "External App".
    • Assign a transport request (TR) and finish the setup.

       

  3. Add Fiori Launchpad App ID:
    • Locate the app ID under the package: Fiori User Interface > Launchpad App Descriptor Items.
    • Add this ID to the IAM app configuration.

       

  4. Create Business Catalog:
    • Create and assign the app to a new business catalog.

       

    • Click on next and select the TR and click on next.
    • Then the dialog opens for creating the Business catalog app assignment, set the name and description and select next and choose the TR.

       

  5. Publish the Catalog and App:
    • Publish the business catalog locally.
    • Publish the IAM app. 
  6. Check the preview of the application form the deployed link.

Step 6: Assign the App to Users

  1. Verify Published IAM App and Catalog:
    • Open the "Display IAM App" to check the published app.

       

    • Verify the catalog in the "Business Catalogs" app.

       

  2. Create Spaces and Pages:
    • Define spaces and pages in the Fiori launchpad.
    • Assign the app to a role and add users to the role.
  3. Verify User Access: Ensure the app is available on the user’s home screen.

Summary

This guide walks you through deploying an SAP Fiori app in the public cloud, covering destination setup, BAS development, deployment, and ABAP configuration. Step-by-step instructions with screenshot placeholders ensure clarity. Following this process minimizes errors for a smooth deployment.

entry.title: Asset Accounting - Asset Revaluation in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Release
entry.content:
Introduction

All our accounting records are based on historical costs. However, with socio-economic development, the past amounts recorded in accounting may not reflect the true fair value, which allows the enterprise to revalue its assets. For example, a commercial real estate property purchased by the company in 2010 had a recorded value of 300,000 CNY. By 2020, the value had increased to 600,000 CNY. Consequently, the recorded value of 300,000 CNY no longer accurately reflects the true and fair value, necessitating a revaluation.

For manual asset revaluation, you can use the "Post Asset Revaluation" application (F7775). Previously, assets could be revalued simultaneously in all or multiple currencies. Typically, revaluations are performed in multiple currencies.

However, in some cases, you may need to perform a revaluation only in the local currency, without affecting the group currency (hard currency). For this purpose, the new business transaction type "Revalue in Selected Currency" is now available. Using this new business transaction type, you can post revaluations in a single (selected) currency and report this change.

This means you can now differentiate between standard revaluation situations (all affected currencies) and specific revaluations (only one currency in all ledgers).

Scenario

An asset was acquired on 12/31/2024 , the depreciation key is CD01. The useful life is 4 years. The depreciation is straight-line. And the scrap value percentage is 5%.

Up to now, the fixed asset has the following values:

APC:

100,000

Planned Depreciation for 2025:

-23,750

Net book value at year-end:

76,250

The formula for asset depreciation in 2025 is 100000*(1-5%)/48*12=23750

After asset acquisition, the planned depreciation has been calculated accordingly.

Due to inflation, a revaluation will be required at the end of the year 2024. The book value of the asset needs to be revalued by 20%.

On the selection screen of the Post Asset Revaluation app, you specify the following values:

For example:

  • A revaluation of the APC of 20,000 CNY and
  • A corresponding revaluation of ordinary depreciation of 5,000 CNY

For manual revaluations, you can use the Post Asset Revaluation app (F7775). Previously, the app allowed you to revaluate in all or several currencies simultaneously. Typically, revaluations are performed in more than one currency.

However, in certain cases, you may need to perform the revaluation in the local currency only, without affecting the group currency (hard currency).

The S4HC 2502 version supports the selection of ‘Revalue in Selected Currency’ in the Business Transaction Type field for a specific revaluation (only one currency across all ledgers).

After revaluation, the APC and depreciation have been adjusted accordingly, and the planned depreciation amount for 2025 is calculated as [(100,000 + 20,000) * (1 - 5%) - 5,000) / 48 * 12] = 27,250.

Except manual revaluation, as of 2502 version, there is a new app Maintain Asset Revaluation Index which introduce the feature about automatic revaluation with revaluation index in a specific depreciation area.

You use this app if you want to periodically perform automatic revaluations based on index values.

Detailed instructions can be found in the link

Here share some results of steps:

  1. Create revaluation index (mandatory)
  2. Assign index ID to asset master record (mandatory)
  3. Check values in the valuation view for the fixed asset (optional)
  4. Check values in asset history sheet (optional)

Step 1: Create revaluation index (mandatory)

Step 2: Assign index ID to asset master record (mandatory)

Step 3: Check values in the valuation view of the manage fixed assets app (optional)

According to revaluation index assigned to the asset, the revaluation amount and depreciation amount will be planned as designed below.

For year 2024

For year 2025

For year 2026

For year 2027

Conclusion

This new features allow for more flexibility in managing asset revaluation, enabling you to handle specific revaluation scenarios more effectively.

entry.title: 销售订单审批流
entry.content:
前言

对于销售订单审批流，一直没有一篇完整的中文Blog，这里写一篇手把手教会的配置过程和介绍最新的APP：灵活工作流管理用来方便监控审批流。

客户和实施方有客制化需求需要沟通的可以在留言区留言，我们可以一起合作完成审批流的搭建。

本博文参考英文Blog:Flexible Workflow for Sales for Public Cloud - Com... - SAP Community

前提配置

1.SSCUI：102751, Define Reasons for Approval Requests (定义审批请求的原因)

2.SSCUI：102572，Assign Reasons for Approval Requests(分配审批请求的原因)

3.APP：管理团队和职责

4.APP：自定义逻辑，参考BADI: SD_APM_SET_APPROVAL_REASON. 

这步骤是最关键的一步，如果审批流没有触发成功，请优先检查这一步，案例使用的是简单场景，如果客户场景比较复杂又不知道如何实现可以留言。

Example Code 1:

" ***** Start

if salesdocument-sddocumentcategory = 'C'  and "Sales Order document category is "C"; Beware Sales Order without charge is "I"

   salesdocument-salesdocumenttype = 'TA'  and "Internal Key values are available in the Badi (TA and not OR)

   salesdocument-salesorganization = '1310'.

   salesdocapprovalreason = 'ZFC1'.

   return.

endif.

" ***** End

5.APP：管理销售凭证工作流

系统实现

销售订单创建人: Chen
一级审批: Fancy
1.创建销售订单，触发审批流

当销售订单处于审批中的状态时，是无法进行更改的

2.审批人收到通知后要求重新返工

3.当销售订单被审批人设置重新返工后，销售订单可以编辑，此时我们可以通过APP：灵活工作流管理来查看审批流的状态，如果审批流触发有问题，我们可以通过此APP重新触发并且查看日志。

4.更改销售订单后重新触发审批流，审批人审批通过销售订单

5.再次通过APP:灵活工作流管理查看审批流状态

注意

如果客户需求当审批中的销售订单不能参与MRP，请参考Blog:

Stop requirement transfer when sales order is in a... - SAP Community

感谢观看

entry.title: SAP ERP公有云预算和计划功能 - 手工导入计划收入数据
entry.content:
背景

很多公有云的实施商和客户有SAP ECC 的实施和使用经验。SAP ECC有一些计划的功能比如：SOP(Sales and operation planning)的功能，基于成本获利能力分析的收入计划功能，成本中心费用计划和通过活动类型计划的消耗数量进一步计算活动类型的计划价格等等。这些功能在S/4HANA 私有云中依然可用（默认处于非激活的状态），但在公有云中这些功能已经不存在了，相关的功能需要在SAP Analytics Cloud和Business Integration Planning这两个SAP产品中实现，或者在非SAP的计划工具软件中实现，然后把计划数据传入S/4HANA Cloud中。

有三种方式可以在S/4HANA系统中生成计划数据

  1. 使用 Fiori 应用导入财务计划数据通过Excel模板导入
  2. 使用Financial Plan Data-Write API
  3. 集成SAC 计划

系统操作

本系列博客将陆续介绍SAP产品的计划功能和S/4HANA公有云的集成。本文将介绍第一种方式通过Excel模板导入计划数据到S/4HANA系统中

打开Fiori 应用导入财务计划数据

可以看到有多个模板

  • 成本中心计划模板用来导入成本中心费用数据，计划的数据后续可以通过Fiori应用管理分配在成本中心中进行分配。
  • 成本中心预算编制模板用来导入成本中心预算数据，后续使用Fiori应用成本中心预算报表查看成本中心的实际和预算的数据
  • 市场细分计划模板用来导入计划的收入。在下载模板的基础之上，可以添加更多的标准字段和扩展字段。参考Help Portal文档：用于财务计划数据导入的字段(此功能类似于在ECC时代基于成本获利能力分析输入或导入计划收入的功能)

后面我们介绍一下市场细分计划模板导入计划收入的流程。

假设我们在SAP系统外已经做好了未来的销售计划，计划数据已经转换成导入模板的格式，在默认导入模板中填加了利润中心，获利能力产品，以公司代码货币计的金额，公司代码货币字段

Fiori 应用导入财务计划数据 点击浏览CSV文件，选择已经准备好的上传文件。可以先测试导入源文件，确定没有报错并且显示将要导入的数据和Excel中准备的数据相符。点击导入源文件。计划数据成功导入后可以点击显示财务计划数据。

也可以使用Fiori 应用市场细分-计划和实际查看收入的计划和实际的数据。

计划和实际的数据通过CDS View I_ActualPlanJrnlEntryItemCube和I_ActualPlanLineItemSemTag查看，可以用来进一步制作嵌入式分析的报表。

小结

本文概览的介绍了计划数据在S/4HANA公有云系统中生成的方式，详细介绍了Excel导入计划收入数据的过程和报表的查看方法，后续博客还会介绍SAP产品其他的计划功能。欢迎关注和讨论，并查看其他的论坛博客。

entry.title: Europe´s 1st Two-Tier SAP Cloud ERP Summit
entry.content:
WALLDORF - On February 18th and 19th, we held the 1st European Two-Tier Cloud ERP Summit, a 1,5-day workshop for partners focusing on connected Large Enterprise scenarios updating also on the future GTM with SAP Business Suite. 

 The purpose of the event was to educate and raise the attention to watch out for such scenarios in architecture discussions with larger clients. It also provided great showcases and increased the credibility and trust in Two-tier ERP operating models. 

 With over 60 participants from EMEA & MEE countries mainly from GSSP (Deloitte, IBM, Accenture etc.) as well as some architects from European VAR´s we had a great turn-up ratio of 90%. 

 The workshop provided our partners with insights and knowledge around the SAP Two-Tier ERP Cloud strategy and popular scenarios, whilst we also deep dived into the architectural guidelines and integrations. Especially, the customer proof points from Bosch, LanXess and Accelleron presented by our partners Deloitte and Accenture resonated very well with our partners. 

 The workshop also helped us foster open and trusted conversations during in-person exchanges between SAP subject matter experts and partner leadership teams.  

Due to high demand among our GSSP´s, we will keep the momentum and plan to provide this workshop in more regions. Let us know if you want to contribute to the next Summits and please contact Nitin Vohra or Nilguen Atasoy.

 “The SAP Two tier Cloud summit allowed a common facilitated workspace where vendors could come together, discuss and learn about how to make SAP S/4 HANA public cloud a success among their clients by learning from each other and SAP. It was valuable in both generating confidence & providing new insights.” - Jonathan Eaton, Senior Specialist Lead | Deloitte Certified Chief Architect |

Deloitte

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.1: Final What's New & Product Assistance available
entry.content:
With immediate effect, the final What's New information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.1 is now available.

To access the final What’s New information, please use the What’s New Viewer.

In addition, the final Product Assistance (aka Application Help) for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.1 is available. Please use the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Help Portal page to access it.

For you as a customer, we recommend to also use the Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool.

The Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool provides you with a personalized and tailored view on What’s New information based on the activated and used scope within your system. The information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.1 will be available in RASD within the next few days. A valid Customer S-user ID is required for login. We recommend to use RASD to prepare for upgrades and updates of your system and to focus on the new and changed features that are relevant for you as a customer.

You can use the commenting feature for What’s New. With this feature, authors can evaluate your feedback and incorporate it into the documentation, if needed. We hope that by opening this channel of communication, we can learn how to further improve our What’s New content for you. To use this feature, you need to be logged into the Help Portal. The feature will only be available in the English version of the documents. To learn more about how the feedback process works in SAP Help Portal, see Giving Documentation Feedback.

entry.title: View Business Event Logs
entry.content:
This analytical application lets you review business events logged in Business Event Logging.

Screen Areas

Information filter

You can use the information filter at the top of the screen to select which data is displayed in the chart and table. This allows you to view your business event log data in various ways. You must enter the Object and Time Interval, as they are mandatory filters. Additionally, you can use other filters such as “Object Component,” “User,” and so on. The Producer Namespace helps you differentiate between SAP-provided and customer events. SAP-provided business events always carry the producer namespace “sap.s4.beh.”

Fig. 2: Filter bar

Visual filter

Visual filter provides a graphical interface for interacting with and filtering your data. It allows you to view and filter the frequency of events based on "Year and Calendar Week," as well as by "Object Component," such as Item or Schedule Line.

Fig. 3: Visual filter bar

Bar chart

The bar chart offers a concise overview of the frequency of specific events. By selecting a bar, you can filter the entries in the table. Additionally, utilize the View By filter to explore different dimensional data. You also have the option to change the chart type from the default bar chart to other types of charts.

Fig. 4: Bar chart in Hybrid view

Fig. 5: Bar chart in Chart-only view

The "Hybrid view," also referred to as "Chart and Table View," is the default setting that displays both the chart and the table simultaneously. Additionally, you have the option to toggle between "Chart-only view" and "Table-only view" within the chart area.

Fig. 6: Toolbar in chart area

Table

The table located at the bottom of the screen provides additional details regarding the logged business events, including Business Event Type, Object IDs, Performed By, and Producer Namespace. In the "Settings" button, you have the option to customize the displayed columns to include information such as Object Keys, Node ID, Source of Data, and more. Additionally, you can utilize the "Group By" and "Sort by" features for the columns.

Upon selecting a table entry, you will be directed to the details page of the business event. Selecting the Object IDs gives you an overview of all the events for an object (components), and the Performed By column provides access to the user contact card.

Fig. 7: Table in Table-only view

Details page

The specifics of the event are presented on the object page. This page provides a summary of the key properties associated with the event.

  • Event type and version
  • Object component and IDs
  • Date of execution
  • User
  • Version and release status of the event (mostly “released” and “deprecated”
  • Source system
  • Transaction codes, if available
  • Source of Data: currently only “Business Event” = externally released business events by SAP, or customer events with event binding

A raised event may include Event Qualifiers and Field Changes, which are presented in separate tables.

Event qualifiers are occasionally used in generic business events. Their values can offer more precise semantics to the business event.

Field Changes provides a comprehensive list of all value modifications recorded in the logged business events. For events with a deep structure, this table additionally displays the path to the changed field.

EventUUID serves as a distinct identifier for the event, while NodeID identifies a specific instance of an object component, such as a Sales Order Item. Additionally, the Transaction ID denotes the technical session(SAP LUW) during which the event was executed within the system.

Fig. 8: Details page

To enable logging of all business event data in the BEL logging configuration, check the All Data option for the SAP Object Type. You can access the logged business event data by clicking the "View Business Event Data" button on the details page.

Fig. 9: Business event data in a popup

Release Information

 

ProductAvailability
SAP S/4 HANA Cloud, Public Edition2411 and later
SAP S/4 HANA Cloud, Private Edition2021 FPS02* and later
SAP S/4 HANA (On-Premise)2021 FPS02* and later
SAP BTP ABAP Environment2411

* In SAP S/4 HANA (On-Premise) and SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition, the functionality of logging and viewing all business data is only available in 2023.

Fiori Apps Library Reference

SAP S/4 HANA Cloud, Public Edition: https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F6021')/S34

SAP S/4 HANA Cloud, Private Edition: https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F6021')/S29PCE

SAP S/4 HANA (On-Premise): https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F6021')/S29OP

entry.title: SAP ERP公有云台湾本地化-代扣税实施建议
entry.content:
引言：由于SAP ERP公有云标准并没有提供台湾本地化的代扣税功能，本篇博客主要是基于对其他国家的参考来实现的，欢迎各位读者能够提出更多的意见和建议。

目录：

  • 代扣税介绍
  • 过账代扣税的业务场景
  • 系统中配置代扣税
  • 代扣税功能演示
  • 代扣税报表
  • 结论
  • 参考信息

___________________________________________________________________________

  • 代扣税介绍

代扣税扣减由适用国家/地区的法定要求决定，因此纯粹是一个本地化主题。在SAP ERP公有云中，通过范围项目 1J2-高级合规性报表进行处理。

代扣税是在某些国家/地区开始付款流时收取的税。通常，应纳税方不会直接向税务部门缴纳代扣税。当有权扣减代扣税的客户支付应缴纳代扣税的供应商发票时，客户会从付款金额中减去代扣税金额。然后，客户直接向相应的税务部门缴纳代扣税。但对于自代扣例外，在这种情况下，受税款约束的供应商有权直接向相关部门支付税款。

在台湾地区，代扣税是公司代扣的居民或非居民收入付款（付款方）的金额。如果您要支付非本地（国外）供应商，则需要预扣发票金额的一定百分比并向税务局支付税表，以及要支付给国外供应商的余额。

涵盖如下付款：

  • 股息
  • 利息
  • 租赁收入
  • 版税
  • 技术费用、服务付款
  • 工资和薪水
  • 佣金

台湾的代扣税制度适用于居民和非居民所赚取的各种收入，按收入类型和纳税人的居住身份确定税率和规定。每种类型的付款都适用不同的代扣税率，如果台湾与非居民（外国方）是税收居民的国家/地区之间存在双重税收协议，则优惠税率可能适用。下表详细说明了台湾代扣税系统中不同付款的相关表单。

收入类型

居民个人

非居民个人

外国公司

股息

20%

21%

21%

利息

10%

20%

20%

租赁收入

10%

20%

20%

版税

10%

20%

20%

专业服务费

10%

20%(有例外)

20%

薪水和工资

6%-18%

18% (如果<183 天停留)

不适用

佣金

-

20%

20%

参考文末链接【3】

代扣税举例：台湾公司向外国公司采购专业服务费税前金额为 5000 美元，外国公司将承担预扣税，因此，台湾公司只需要向国外公司支付4000美 元，扣除的1000美 元（5000 美元的 20%）应该支付给税务部门。

  • 过账代扣税的业务场景
  1. 根据每个国家/地区的法律要求，在不同阶段计算代扣税并将其过账到相应的代扣税科目。通常，代扣税是在过账付款的同时过账的。换言之，付款（应付账款）或收款（应收账款）将减去代扣税金额。
  2. 在应付账款中，供应商应纳税，公司有义务扣减代扣税并代表供应商将其支付给税务部门。在应收账款中，公司本身需要缴税。与此公司有业务往来的客户扣减代扣税，并代表公司将其支付给税务部门。在这两种情况下，应纳税人/实体的业务伙伴都会扣减税款并将其支付给税务部门。
  3. 在某些国家/地区（例如巴西、菲律宾和西班牙），代扣税可以或必须在过账发票时过账。这意味着应收账款或应付账款金额会减去代扣税金额。
  4. 在某些国家/地区（例如阿根廷和意大利），某些业务交易需要其他类型的过账。代扣税将作为抵销分录过账到费用科目，而不是按代扣税金额减少的付款金额。维护代扣税代码时为此进行相关设置。
  5. 重置已清算项目时，如果清算凭证包含代扣税数据，则会自动冲销。对于含累计的代扣税类型，如果冲销付款凭证，则会调整累计基础金额。
  6. 本博客中，会示例应付发票时点过账代扣税及付款时点过账代扣税这两种场景。

 

  • 系统中配置代扣税

     1.  激活代扣税

要在SAP ERP公有云中使用代扣税（也称为扩展代扣税），必须先将其激活。

2. 定义代扣税代码– 106576

代扣税代码用于标识不同的代扣税类型。

3. 为付款过账定义代扣税类型– 104226

预扣税可以在两个时间点扣除；可以在开票时或付款时扣除。因此，对于此代扣税类型，将创建一个代扣税类型用于付款，另一个用于发票。

4. 为发票过账定义代扣税类型– 104225

预扣税可以在两个时间点扣除；可以在开票时或付款时扣除。因此，对于此代扣税类型，将创建一个代扣税类型用于付款，另一个用于发票。

5. 为公司代码分配代扣税类型– 103914

6. 定义代扣税码- 104227

在代扣税代码中，维护不同的税率并维护对应扣减的基础。

7. 定义代扣税码生效最小/最大限定金额 – 103915

如果需要，可以定义代扣税码生效最小/最大限定金额，如果不指定任何金额，则代表代扣税没有上下限金额的限定。

8. 将代扣税代码分配给代扣税码 – 105553

9. 为代扣税类型分配汇率类型 - 104400

10. 为过账代扣税分配总账科目 – 100297

11. 检查代扣税配置

 

  • 代扣税功能演示

SAP ERP公有云中代扣税也称为扩展代扣税，包含代扣税类型和代扣税代码。代扣税类型表示基本计算规则。代扣税代码代表这些规则的特定功能，尤其是百分率。

如果特定交易需要多种代扣税，则在SAP ERP公有云系统中通过定义多个代扣税类型来涵盖这一点。输入行项目时，可以为每种代扣税类型输入代扣税数据。但请注意，如果发票中有两组或多组代扣税代码和类型，则必须决定所有建议的代扣税代码和类型是否与交易相关。如果不计算和过账某些建议的代扣税，则必须移除与交易无关的代扣税代码。

 

1. 在发票时点过账代扣税

1). 维护业务伙伴主数据

从如上截屏中能够看到供应商代扣税类型设定为发票过账时点生成代扣税行项目，代扣税码为T1即20%的代扣税率。

2). 过账供应商发票

查看模拟生成的财务分录：

查看到生成了代扣税凭证分录，以抵减应付账款金额。

2. 付款时点过账代扣税

1). 维护业务伙伴主数据

从如上截屏中能够看到供应商代扣税类型设定为付款时点生成代扣税行项目，代扣税码为T1即20%的代扣税率。

2). 过账供应商发票

查看模拟生成的财务分录：

3). 对供应商发票付款

模拟付款凭证，可以看到付款时点生成了下图的代扣税行项目。

目前，对于台湾的代扣税过账时点，客户可以根据需求参考应用对应的场景。

 

  • 代扣税报表

对于某些国家/地区，代扣税报表根据从供应商凭证和客户凭证中收集的信息生成，例如已清算发票、供应商贷记凭证、预付定金和已清算贷记凭证。系统生成可提交给政府部门的文本文件。某些国家/地区的凭证和报表合规性(DRC)功能被激活后，可以使用运行法定报表生成代扣税报表。

例如，如下是美国的代扣税报表：

Withholding Tax (1099-MISC) Report for the US

如下是比利时的代扣税报表信息：

Withholding Tax Report in Belgium

但是目前SAP ERP公有云还没有为台湾提供标准的代扣税申报报表，可以使用如下CDS View来获取相应的代扣税信息：

  • I_SupplierWithHoldingTax ：供应商代扣税
  • I_CustomerWithTax ：客户代扣税
  • I_WithholdingTaxCode ：代扣税码
  • I_SuplrInvcHeaderWhldgTaxAPI01 (供应商发票的代扣税)

现在已经有台湾客户发送代扣税申报报表的需求给SAP ERP公有云产品部门，期待未来台湾本地化功能中代扣税申报报表的呈现。客户请求详细请参考如下链接：

Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence

在CE2502版本开始SAP ERP公有云提供了一个新的应用程序“代扣税分析”，该应用程序能够回答一个问题，那就是“如何计算此交易的代扣税？”，如下是德国公司代码的范例：

对于该应用的信息，请参考帮助文档：Withholding Tax Calculation Analysis | SAP Help Portal

然而，该应用暂时不支持台湾地区使用，会提示如下信息：

期待未来该应用可以开放给台湾使用。

 

  • 结论

在台湾地区，代扣税适用于不同收入类型，例如台湾地区内部生成的股息、租金、利息和版税。其重要性在于确保及时征税、简化税务管理、执行遵约。

在每月的第十天之前，代扣代缴税申报方应向财政部缴纳上个月扣缴的税款，并于下一纳税年度的 1 月之前向税务局提交扣缴证明，具体说明上一年缴纳税款和扣缴的税款。如果在 1 月份有连续的公共节假日，则提交扣缴证明的时期应延长至 2 月 5 日。对于向非居民或在 ROC 中没有常设机构的外国企业支付的收入，代扣代缴税代理应在预扣税款后向财政部支付扣缴的税款，并在扣缴后十天内向税务局提交代扣代缴税报表和收据。参考文末链接【4】

与台湾许多税种一样，对税务申报的误解或错过截止期限，都会给在台内外经营的外国公司造成经济损失。

 

  • 参考信息
  1. Help Portal Documentation | Withholding Tax
  2.  Virtual Data Model and CDS Views | Withholding Tax for Supplier Invoice
  3. Taiwan withholding Tax Guide | Tax | SongjerCPA
  4. When shall a withholding agent file returns and make payments of tax withheld?
  5. Withholding Tax (1099-MISC) Report in the US
  6. Withholding Tax Report in Belgium

entry.title: SAP ERP公有雲台灣本土化 - 扣繳稅方案建議
entry.content:
簡介：由於SAP ERP公有雲標準並未提供針對台灣本土化的扣繳稅功能，因此此部落格主要根據來自其他國家的參考內容，歡迎讀者提出其他意見及建議。

目錄：

  • 扣繳稅簡介
  • 過帳扣繳稅的方案
  • 組態系統中的扣繳稅
  • 扣繳稅功能展示
  • 扣繳稅報表
  • 結論
  • 參考資訊

_______________________________________________________________

  • 扣繳稅簡介

由於扣繳稅扣除是根據適用國家的法定需求所規定，因此這純粹是本土化主題。在SAP ERP公有雲中，這會透過範圍項目 1J2- advanced Compliance Reporting 處理。

扣繳稅為部份國家/地區付款流程開始時收取的稅。一般而言，課稅方不會直接向稅捐機構支付扣繳稅。當授權扣除扣繳稅的客戶支付應付扣繳稅的供應商發票時，客戶會從付款金額中扣除扣繳稅額。接著，客戶會直接將扣繳稅支付給個別稅捐機構。然而，針對自行扣繳，視情況而定，供應商有權直接向機關支付稅款。

在台灣，扣繳稅為貴公司扣繳的居民或非居民所得稅 (付款人) 金額。若您正在支付非本地 (國外) 供應商，則必須扣繳發票金額的特定百分比並支付稅務表單給稅捐機關，以及要支付給國外供應商的餘額。

涵蓋下列付款：

  • 股利
  • 利息
  • 租賃收入
  • 版稅
  • 技術費用、服務付款
  • 工資和薪資
  • 佣金

台灣的代扣稅制，適用於居民與非居民所得的各種收入，按納稅人的收入類型和居住狀態確定稅率和規定。不同扣繳稅率適用於每種支付，如果台灣與非居民（外國人）為稅務居民的國家簽訂雙重徵稅協議，則適用優惠稅率。下列表格詳細說明台灣扣繳稅系統中不同付款的相關表單。

收入類型

居民個人

非居民個人

外國公司

股利

20%

21%

21%

利息

10%

20%

20%

租賃收入

10%

20%

20%

版稅

10%

20%

20%

專業費用

10%

20%〈有異常〉

20%

薪資和工資

6%-18%

18% (若 <183 天住宿)

不適用

佣金

-

20%

20%

參考連結 [3]

扣繳稅款範例：台灣企業向稅前5000元的外商購買專業服務，外商將承擔扣繳稅，因此台灣企業只需向外國企業支付4000美元，應向稅務機關繳納1000美元（折合5,000美元20%）的扣除。

  • 過帳扣繳稅的方案
  1. 根據各國家/地區的法律規定，扣繳稅會在不同階段進行計算，並過帳至對應的扣繳稅科目。作為規則，扣繳稅會在過帳付款的同時過帳。換句話說，扣繳稅額會減少付款 (應付帳款) 或收款 (應收帳款)。
  2. 在應付帳款中，供應商可稅，且公司有義務代表供應商扣除扣繳稅並支付給稅捐機構。在應收帳款中，公司本身需要課稅。與此公司進行業務的客戶可扣除扣繳稅，並代表公司支付給稅捐機構。在這兩種情況下，應稅人/實體的業務夥伴皆會扣除稅並支付給稅捐機構。
  3. 在某些國家/地區 (例如巴西、菲律賓和西班牙)，扣繳稅可在過帳發票時或必須過帳。這表示扣繳稅額會減少應收帳款或應付帳款金額。
  4. 在部份國家/地區 (例如阿根廷和義大利)，部份商業交易需要其他類型的過帳。扣繳稅會過帳為費用科目的沖銷分錄，而非扣繳稅金額減少的付款金額。維護扣繳稅碼時，您可進行相關設定。
  5. 重設結清的項目時，若結清文件包含扣繳稅資料，則會自動迴轉。針對含累計的扣繳稅類型，若已迴轉付款文件，則會調整累計基礎金額。
  6. 在此部落格中，範例 A/P 發票中會顯示付款時過帳扣繳稅和過帳扣繳稅的兩個方案。
  • 組態系統中的扣繳稅

1. 啟用扣繳稅 - 104228

若要在SAP ERP公有雲中使用扣繳稅 (也稱為延伸扣繳稅)，您必須先啟用。

2. 定義扣繳稅碼 – 106576

扣繳稅碼用於識別不同的扣繳稅類型。

3. 定義付款過帳的扣繳稅類型 – 104226

扣繳稅可於兩點扣除；可於開立發票時或付款時扣除。因此，針對此扣繳稅類型，系統會針對付款建立一個扣繳稅類型，而另一個用於發票。

4. 定義發票過帳的扣繳稅類型 – 104225

扣繳稅可於兩點扣除；可於開立發票時或付款時扣除。因此，針對此扣繳稅類型，系統會針對付款建立一個扣繳稅類型，而另一個用於發票。

5. 將扣繳稅類型指派給公司代碼 – 103914

6. 定義扣繳稅碼 - 104227

在扣繳稅碼中維護不同稅率，並維護對應扣除的基準。

7. 定義扣繳稅碼有效最小/最大限制金額 – 103915

您可視需要定義扣繳稅碼有效的最小/最大限制金額，或者若未指定金額，則扣繳稅額沒有下限和下限的金額限制。

8. 將扣繳稅碼指派給扣繳稅代碼 – 105553

9. 將匯率類型指派給扣繳稅類型 - 104400

10. 指派過帳扣繳稅的總帳科目 – 100297

11. 檢查扣繳稅組態

①檢查公司代碼

②檢查業務夥伴

③檢查扣繳稅類型

④模擬計算

 

  • 扣繳稅功能展示

SAP ERP公有雲中的扣繳稅也稱為延伸扣繳稅，並包含扣繳稅類型和扣繳稅碼。扣繳稅類型代表基礎計算規則。扣繳稅碼代表這些規則的特定功能，特別是百分比。

若特定交易需要一個以上的扣繳稅，則 SAP 系統中會透過定義數個扣繳稅類型來涵蓋此扣繳稅。輸入細目時，您可以輸入每個扣繳稅類型的扣繳稅資料。請注意，若發票中有兩個或多個扣繳稅代碼和類型集，則必須決定所有建議的扣繳稅碼和類型是否與交易相關。若未計算並過帳部份建議的扣繳稅，則必須移除與交易無關的扣繳稅碼。

1. 於發票點過帳扣繳稅方案

    1) 維護業務夥伴主檔資料

在上述擷取畫面中，您可看到供應商扣繳稅類型已設為發票過帳的時間點，以產生扣繳稅代碼 T1 (扣繳稅率為 20%) 的扣繳稅明細項目。

2). 過帳供應商發票

檢視模擬產生的財務輸入項：

您會看到扣繳稅文件輸入項已產生，以減少應付金額。

2. 於付款點過帳扣繳稅

    1). 維護業務夥伴主檔資料

在上述擷取畫面中，您可看到已將供應商扣繳稅類型設定為付款點，以產生扣繳稅代碼 T1 的扣繳稅明細項目 (扣繳稅率為 20%)。

2). 過帳供應商發票

檢視模擬產生的財務輸入項：

3). 供應商發票付款

模擬付款文件，您可在下列數字中查看付款點產生扣繳稅明細項目。

針對台灣的扣繳稅過帳點，客戶目前可根據需求參考對應方案。

 

  • 扣繳稅報表

針對部份國家/地區，扣繳稅報表會根據自供應商和客戶文件收集的資訊產生，例如結清發票、供應商貸項通知單、訂金和結清的貸項通知單。系統會產生可提交給政府機關的內文檔案。部份國家/地區的 Document and Reporting Compliance (DRC) 功能啟用後，您可使用 [執行法定報表] 產生扣繳稅報表。

例如，美國的扣繳稅報表如下：

美國扣繳稅 (1099-MISC) 報表

比利時的扣繳稅申報資訊如下：

比利時扣繳稅報表

然而，SAP 尚未提供台灣的標準扣繳稅申報報表，且可使用下列 CDS 檢視以取得對應扣繳稅資訊：

  • I_SupplierWithHoldingTax：供應商扣繳稅
  • I_CustomerWithTax：客戶扣繳稅
  • I_WithholdingTaxCode：扣繳稅碼
  • I_SuplrInvcHeaderWhldgTaxAPI01: 供應商發票上的扣繳稅

現在台灣客戶需要將扣繳稅申報報表傳送給SAP ERP公有雲產品部門，並期待未來台灣本土化功能中的扣繳稅申報報表呈現。如需客戶請求，請參閱下列詳細連結：

改善請求明細 - 客戶影響

從 CE2502 開始，SAP ERP公有雲提供新的應用程式「扣繳稅分析」，可回答問題「要如何計算此交易的扣繳稅？」下列是德國公司代碼的範例：

如需有關應用程式的資訊，請參閱輔助說明文件： 扣繳稅計算分析 | SAP Help Portal

然而，此應用程式暫時不支援台灣人使用，提示下列資訊：

希望未來將開放該應用程式在台灣使用。

 

  • 結論

在台灣地區，扣繳稅適用於不同的收入類型，例如台灣內部產生的股利、租金、利息和權利金。要確保及時納稅，簡化稅收管理，落實各項合規制度。

在每月第十天前，扣繳稅申報人應當向財政部繳納稅款上個月，並在下一納稅年度1月前向稅務機關提交扣繳證明，具體規定上一年度繳納稅款和代扣稅款。如果1月連續有國定假日，則提交扣繳憑證的期間應延長至2月5日。對於向非居民或者外國企業繳納的在中華民國境內沒有常設機構的收入，扣繳代理人應當在代扣稅款後向財政部繳納代扣稅款，並在代扣後十日內向稅務機關提交扣繳稅款申報和收據。參考連結 [4]

像台灣很多稅種一樣，對報稅的誤解和錯過期限，可能會給台灣境內外經營的外商造成經濟損失。

 

  • 參考資訊
  • Help Portal 紀錄文件 | 扣繳稅
  •  虛擬資料模型和 CDS 檢視 | 供應商發票扣繳稅
  • 台灣扣繳稅指南 | 稅 | SongjerCPA
  • 持有代理人何時應退回並支付扣繳稅？
  • 美國扣繳稅 (1099-MISC) 報表
